Addresses were made by Clifford Pin

on Forestry; Production by Irrf-
gation," by /. d. O'Donnell of Bill
ings, Mont, Professor f. Benjamin
Andrews of the University of Ne
braska and Herbert Myrick. editor of
Orange Judd Farmer; Engineering
and Mechanics" by Frederick Newell,

United States weather bureau; 'Rur-

Smythe of San Diego, Cal.


The convention promises to be one
of the most interesting and important
gatherings of irrigationists ever held.
Particular effort has been made to
secure addresses by experts of ma
tional reputation, and in this the ex-
ecutive committee has succeeded
well.


One of the features of the gather
ing is an exhibit of raisins, dried
fruits, nuts and wines, all the prod
uct of California, sent to FL Paso by
the California promotion committee.
